title: Operationalize review-validity benchmark and human-low/ai-high failure cases
description: Turn the v3 review-validity benchmark into runnable runtime work by adding benchmark artifact sets, recording human-low/ai-high conflicts as failures, and validating that review packets can reject low-quality human-facing outputs instead of over-scoring them.
triage_notes: Benchmark opened from 2026-06-15 owner concern: AI currently overestimates output quality from an AI-internal perspective and may miss human-perceived low quality.
